narrative: An 8‑year senior machine learning engineer at Amazon, a product‑first company, brings strong verified skill depth in search‑focused AI, which is the main reason for his relatively high placement. He has hands‑on experience with OpenSearch, BM25 ranking, learning‑to‑rank models and deep‑learning frameworks such as PyTorch and TensorFlow—exactly the stack the role demands. His broad technical skill set and stable career also add points. However, his platform engagement is below average and he is based in Kochi with an unknown notice period, which may affect immediate availability for a Pune/Noida team.
